title: Security review for frontend and backend

tasks.description: Inspect frontend components, routing, and user input handling for XSS, unsafe HTML, and client-side injection risks.
tasks.acceptance: A documented list of frontend security findings and risk areas is produced.

tasks.description: Run frontend-focused security checks and verify no exposed secrets or obvious client-side vulnerabilities remain.
tasks.acceptance: Frontend security scan results are recorded and reviewed.

tasks.description: Inspect backend routes, auth, validation, and data persistence paths for injection, auth bypass, and insecure defaults.
tasks.acceptance: A documented list of backend security findings and risk areas is produced.

tasks.description: Run backend-focused security checks and verify no exposed secrets or obvious server-side vulnerabilities remain.
tasks.acceptance: Backend security scan results are recorded and reviewed.

tasks.description: Run targeted security scans and validation checks on both frontend and backend, then summarize results.
tasks.acceptance: A consolidated security review summary is produced with actionable follow-ups.
